name: Bricklayer's Salsa (Salsa De Albaniles)
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Onion, peeled and quartered              - or broiled in water
2 small Garlic cloves, peeled                    1/3 to 1/2 cup water
1 1/2 ts Salt or to taste                      pn Sugar
1 cup Cilantro, minced                    1 ts Salt or to taste
4 to 6 fresh serranos               8    Sprigs fresh cilantro,
2 or 3 jalapenos, stemmed         3/4 c  White onion, peeled and
recipeInstructions:
1. Add onion, garlic, and salt to a mortar or food processor.
- If using a mortar, grind well.
- If using a processor, pulse once very quickly.
It is very important not to overprocess; the salsa's texture will suffer if you do.
2. Pulse minced cilantro briefly.
3. Add chilies, tomatillos, and water.
Pulse again until combined.
4. Season to taste with salt or sugar.
5. Garnish with chopped cilantro and onion.
